content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on May 20, 2026, focused on transitioning agent lifecycle operations to a robust job queue system, advancing the OWNER/AGENT connector registry architecture, and stabilizing the v2.0.2 release. Significant progress was made in cloud infrastructure, UI polish, and hardening the elizaOS live demo environment.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Agent Lifecycle & Cloud Infrastructure**
    *   Migrated all agent lifecycle operations (suspend, restart, snapshot, logs) to a job queue, decoupling workers from core services ([#7810](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7810)).
    *   Refactored managed services to enqueue jobs instead of performing inline shutdowns ([#7815](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7815), [#7816](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7816)).
    *   Stabilized cloud E2E mock stacks and improved frontend toast tracking for async job IDs ([#7813](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7813), [#7824](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7824), [#7825](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7825)).

*   **Connector Registry & OAuth Enhancements**
    *   Implemented the OWNER+AGENT registry schema, allowing connectors to manage independent identities for users and agents ([#7817](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7817)).
    *   Enabled end-to-end OWNER role support via Eliza Cloud OAuth for plugin-x and updated setup UI to be role-aware ([#7819](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7819), [#7851](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7851)).
    *   Unhardcoded "OWNER" roles in OAuth callbacks for Linear, Calendly, and Shopify plugins ([#7820](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7820)).

*   **System Hardening & Release Polish**
    *   Promoted `develop` to `main` for v2.0.2 release, including fixes for BSC wallet attachment and performance optimizations ([#7828](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7828), [#7840](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7840), [#7842](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7842)).
    *   Polished the elizaOS live demo and USB-installer workflows, including mobile packaging and CI validation ([#7803](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7803)).
    *   Fixed UI z-index issues and made voice onboarding skippable to improve user experience ([#7814](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7814), [#7831](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7831)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7871](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7871): fix(os): harden USB persistence image flow.
*   [#7850](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7850): feat(mobile): add local voice and sandbox routing.
*   [#7839](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7839): fix(ui): share connector-accounts hook across OWNER+AGENT sections.
*   [#7838](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7838): fix(app-core): connector accounts schema + loader.
*   [#7822](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7822): chore(deps): refresh bun lockfile for new workspaces.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly closed in the provided activity data.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Benchmark & Release Orchestration**
    *   [#7836](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7836): Enable publishable Hyperliquid live harness runs; currently gated by private key requirements.
    *   [#7837](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7837): Release orchestrator startup failure due to missing platform-signing secrets during tag pushes.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported in the provided activity data.*
